app_info.subtitle: Manage Sequenzy
app_info.description: Sequenzy helps users manage company workspaces, sender websites, subscribers, email campaigns, landing pages, sequences, transactional email, team access, inbox conversations, webhooks, and reporting from ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves, computes, or generates data to return to the user without changing Sequenzy records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not directly publish to public internet state or transmit content to external recipients outside the private Sequenzy workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, cancel, revoke, overwrite irreversibly, or perform a destructive admin action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can create, update, delete, send, schedule, select, or otherwise change Sequenzy workspace state.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not directly publish to public internet state or transmit content to external recipients outside the private Sequenzy workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, cancel, revoke, overwrite irreversibly, or perform a destructive admin action.

justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, cancel, revoke, overwrite irreversibly, or perform a destructive admin action.

test_cases.description: Select the active company before workspace operations.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show my Sequenzy account companies and switch to the Acme workspace.
test_cases.expected_output: Lists available companies and selects the requested company for follow-up actions.

test_cases.description: Create a brand workspace from a website domain.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a Sequenzy company for example.com and tell me when it is ready.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates the company, polls processing status, selects it, and returns the company details.

test_cases.user_prompt: Add newsletter.example.com as a sender website and check whether it has finished processing.
test_cases.expected_output: Adds the website and reports processing or readiness status.

test_cases.description: Create and test an outbound webhook endpoint.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a webhook named CRM Sync for https://hooks.example.com/sequenzy and send a test event.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates the webhook endpoint, returns the one-time signing secret, and reports the test delivery result.

test_cases.description: Invite a teammate to the workspace.
test_cases.user_prompt: Invite taylor@example.com as a viewer to this Sequenzy workspace.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates or sends the team invitation and reports the invited user and role.

test_cases.description: Build dashboard links for generated assets.
test_cases.user_prompt: Give me dashboard links for campaign cmp_123 and sequence seq_456.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns concrete Sequenzy dashboard URLs for the requested resources.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated calendar management.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Move my meeting with Sam to next Tuesday.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar scheduling is outside Sequenzy workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for personal finance advice.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Which ETF should I buy this month?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because investment advice is unrelated to Sequenzy email marketing or workspace operations.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for generic image editing.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Remove the background from this product photo.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because image editing is outside the MCP server capabilities.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger when the user asks for another email platform.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Create this campaign in Mailchimp instead of Sequenzy.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request targets a different email platform.
